title: Crispy Tempeh Burger
description: A plant-based twist on the classic burger, featuring crispy tempeh patties and a variety of toppings.
instructions: Preheat a non-stick skillet over medium heat.
Cut the tempeh into 4 equal pieces and cook for 3-4 minutes per side, or until crispy and golden brown.
Toast the burger buns by grilling them for 1-2 minutes, or until lightly browned.
Assemble the burgers by spreading mayonnaise, ketchup, and mustard on the bottom bun, followed by a tempeh patty, lettuce, tomato, cucumber, and avocado.
Top with the top bun and serve immediately.
